title: Texas No-Income-Tax Break-Even by Origin State (2026)
methodology: Break-even home value = state income tax saved by moving to TX / (TX effective property-tax rate - origin-state effective property-tax rate). State effective property-tax rates: Tax Foundation, 2024 (tax paid as share of owner-occupied home value). State income tax: computed from 2025 state tax brackets (IL flat 4.95%; CA/NY progressive). TX has no state income tax. TX effective owner-occupied property-tax rate modeled across a 1.40%-2.00% range (1.40% = TX statewide TF 2024; ~1.6-1.7% = DFW new-buyer effective with homestead; ~2.0% = higher-tax urban metro). Figures are for one income scenario and illustrate direction, not individual tax advice.
limitations: Single income level ($200K taxable MFJ); ignores sales tax, deductions beyond the scenario, and SALT-cap interactions; metro and county rates vary widely within Texas; not individualized tax advice.
